_comment: Pose presets: maps activity keywords to body pose prompts. Multiple keys (synonyms/translations) can map to the same prompt.

standing.prompt: standing with one hand on hip, weight shifted to one leg, shoulder slightly raised, chin up

sitting.prompt: sitting comfortably in a chair, legs crossed, hands resting on lap, relaxed shoulders

reading.prompt: sitting with book in hands, head tilted slightly down, focused posture, legs tucked

cooking.prompt: standing at kitchen counter, one hand stirring, slightly leaned forward, apron on

sleeping.prompt: lying on side, head on pillow, eyes closed, relaxed curled body

walking.prompt: mid-stride walking pose, arms naturally swinging, upright posture, looking ahead

running.prompt: dynamic running pose, one foot forward, arms pumping, leaning forward

dancing.prompt: graceful dance pose, one arm raised, body turned, weight on one foot

eating.prompt: sitting at table, fork in hand, leaning slightly toward plate, napkin on lap

drinking.prompt: holding glass near lips, elbow raised, other hand resting on table

working.prompt: sitting at desk, hands on keyboard, slightly hunched forward, focused posture

exercising.prompt: athletic stance, arms flexed, feet shoulder-width apart, dynamic energy

meditating.prompt: cross-legged on floor, hands on knees palms up, straight back, eyes closed

painting.prompt: standing at easel, brush in one hand, palette in other, stepping back to look

gaming.prompt: sitting forward on chair, controller in hands, elbows on knees, intense focus

cleaning.prompt: on all fours cleaning, hands and knees on floor, focused cleaning task

gardening.prompt: kneeling on ground, hands in soil, sun hat on, looking down at plants

shopping.prompt: walking with bags in hand, browsing posture, one hand reaching toward shelf

relaxing.prompt: reclined on couch, legs stretched out, hands behind head, laid-back posture

studying.prompt: hunched over books at desk, pen in hand, chin resting on other hand

singing.prompt: standing upright, mouth open, one hand near chest, other hand gesturing

playing.prompt: playful dynamic pose, arms outstretched, light bouncy stance

talking.prompt: standing relaxed, one hand gesturing while speaking, open expressive posture

showering.prompt: standing under water, head tilted back, eyes closed, arms raised to hair

bathing.prompt: reclining in bathtub, arms resting on edges, head tilted back, relaxed

yoga.prompt: standing in tree pose, one foot on inner thigh, arms raised above head, balanced

meeting.prompt: sitting at conference table, hands folded, upright posture, attentive engaged pose

presenting.prompt: standing in front of audience, one hand gesturing, other holding notes, confident posture

driving.prompt: sitting with hands on steering wheel, upright posture, eyes forward, seatbelt on

photography.prompt: standing with camera raised to eye, one knee slightly bent, focused stance
synonyms: posing for a photo on a desk
adjusting the aperture of the canon r5 and testing the autofocus

watching_tv.prompt: slumped comfortably on a sofa, legs extended or crossed, arms resting loosely on cushions or holding a remote, head tilted toward the screen

thinking.prompt: leaning forward slightly, one elbow propped on a knee while the other hand supports the chin, contemplative gaze

waiting.prompt: standing with weight shifted to one leg, arms loosely crossed over the chest, head tilted slightly as if scanning

kneeling.prompt: kneeling upright, legs folded beneath the torso, arms resting gently on the thighs, back held straight

celebrating.prompt: standing with legs slightly apart, arms raised high in a celebratory gesture, energetic stance

making_coffee.prompt: standing upright, leaning slightly forward at a counter, hands operating the coffee machine or pitcher, focused posture

serving.prompt: standing upright behind a counter, leaning slightly forward with hands resting on the surface, ready stance

monitoring.prompt: sitting upright with focused gaze, hands resting lightly on desk or device, legs firmly on the floor

flirting.prompt: leaning slightly forward with an open posture, one hand gently touching the hair, relaxed crossed legs

filming.prompt: standing upright with slight forward lean, holding a camera steady with both hands at eye level, legs shoulder-width apart for balance

chopping.prompt: standing with knees bent and feet wide apart, leaning forward with arms extended downward as if striking or chopping

applying_makeup.prompt: sitting upright with legs crossed, arms raised holding a makeup brush or sponge near the face

changing_clothes.prompt: standing with one leg slightly bent, arms reaching behind the head or holding a garment, torso slightly twisted

freshening_up.prompt: standing upright, leaning slightly toward a mirror, hands engaged in grooming or washing

lying.prompt: lying flat with limbs sprawled loosely, arms resting at the sides, head tilted back
synonyms: lying on a blue velvet sofa

bending_to_fridge.prompt: standing upright with legs slightly apart, bending forward at the waist while extending both arms forward to handle the refrigerator door

washing_dishes.prompt: standing at sink, legs slightly apart, arms extended forward with elbows bent, hands scrubbing under running water
synonyms: washing knives in the kitchen sink

holding_knife.prompt: standing upright with a relaxed posture, holding a knife firmly in one hand while the other arm rests naturally at the side
synonyms: holding a knife in the kitchen

recovering.prompt: slumped in a chair with a relaxed posture, arms resting loosely on the knees, legs gently crossed

shooting.prompt: standing with knees slightly bent and feet shoulder-width apart, firearm held with both hands extended forward at shoulder height, elbows tucked in

commanding_attention.prompt: standing tall with shoulders back, feet planted firmly in a wide stance, arms held open and deliberate at the sides
